- 新增云端服务器管理，支持添加、编辑和删除 WebDAV/SMB 服务器
- 新增云端文件浏览，可远程浏览服务器目录和文件
- 新增云端视频远程播放，支持 WebDAV 和 SMB 协议直接串流
- 新增云端字幕自动发现，播放远程视频时自动搜索同目录字幕
- 新增底部导航栏，提供本地、云端、设置三个标签页
- 新增 SAF 文档提供器，字幕选择器可浏览云端目录

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Add cloud server management with support for adding, editing, and deleting WebDAV/SMB servers
- Add cloud file browsing to remotely navigate server directories and files
- Add cloud video remote playback with direct streaming over WebDAV and SMB protocols
- Add cloud subtitle auto-discovery to automatically search for subtitles in the same remote directory during playback
- Add bottom navigation bar with Local, Cloud, and Settings tabs
- Add SAF document provider so the subtitle picker can browse cloud directories

</details>
